creator: will@physics.purdue.edu
text:
On Sun, Nov 05, 2000 at 11:19:49AM +0100, lyngbol@candid.dk wrote:
> >Synopsis:       new port of GQmpeg (devel version)

Is there any decent reason why we can't just merge this into the current
version of gqmpeg we have in the tree?  I've always been mistrustful of
what other developers call ``development'' until I see for myself.

-- 
wca
